evals.prompt: How do I set up an event-triggered welcome email campaign in Customer.io?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on creating an event-triggered welcome email campaign using Customer.io Journeys

assertions.name: mentions_campaign_with_event_trigger
assertions.description: Mentions creating a campaign triggered by a specific event

assertions.name: mentions_visual_workflow_builder
assertions.description: Mentions the visual workflow builder or Journeys for designing the campaign flow

assertions.name: mentions_segments_or_event_conditions
assertions.description: Mentions using segments or event conditions to target the right audience

evals.prompt: I need to send a transactional order confirmation email via the Customer.io API
evals.expected_output: Guidance on sending a transactional email through the Customer.io API

assertions.name: mentions_send_email_endpoint
assertions.description: Mentions the POST /send/email endpoint for sending transactional emails

assertions.name: mentions_transactional_message_id_or_template
assertions.description: Mentions transactional_message_id or referencing a template to specify the email content

assertions.name: mentions_bearer_token_auth
assertions.description: Mentions Bearer token authentication for API requests

evals.prompt: How do I set up Customer.io Data Pipelines to sync data from Snowflake into my workspace?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on configuring Customer.io Data Pipelines to ingest data from Snowflake

assertions.name: mentions_data_pipelines_or_reverse_etl
assertions.description: Mentions Data Pipelines or reverse ETL as the integration mechanism

assertions.name: mentions_snowflake_as_source
assertions.description: Mentions configuring Snowflake as a data source

assertions.name: mentions_syncing_profiles_or_attributes
assertions.description: Mentions syncing profiles or attributes into the Customer.io workspace
